prompt: Summarize in one sentence: The conformal gate bounds the probability that a hard query stays on-device by calibrating a threshold on queries the edge model got wrong.
Summarize in one sentence: Retrieval-augmented generation combines a vector search step with an LLM to answer questions grounded in a private document store.
Summarize in one sentence: Quantization reduces model size by representing weights at lower bit precision, trading some accuracy for faster inference and smaller memory footprint.
Summarize in one sentence: Edge AI places inference directly on mobile or IoT devices so that data never leaves the local hardware, reducing latency and improving privacy.
Summarize in one sentence: Apple Silicon M-series chips integrate CPU, GPU, and a Neural Engine on one die, enabling efficient on-device machine learning workloads.
Summarize in one sentence: The transformer architecture uses self-attention to weigh the importance of all tokens in a sequence when predicting each output token.
Summarize in one sentence: Mixture-of-experts models activate only a subset of their parameters per input token, achieving large model capacity at lower inference cost.
Summarize in one sentence: Speculative decoding uses a small draft model to propose multiple tokens at once, which a large verifier model accepts or rejects in a single forward pass.
List three risks of running an LLM only on-device.
What is the capital of France?
Name the programming language created by Guido van Rossum.
What does HTTP stand for?
How many bits are in a byte?
What year did the first iPhone launch?
Rewrite as a polite one-line email: meeting moved to 3pm.
Rewrite the following as a bulleted list: We need milk eggs bread and coffee.
Convert to title case: the quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog.
Rewrite as a formal sentence: hey can u send me the report asap thx.
Translate to one simple sentence: Please provide a brief yet comprehensive overview of the current status.
Extract just the numbers from this sentence: We sold 42 units at $19 each for a total of $798.
